signals.headline: Interactive Brokers Launches SOL Trading for European Investors | YES | MED**
signals.raw:
Interactive Brokers Launches SOL Trading for European Investors | YES | MED**  
Interactive Brokers enabled direct Solana (SOL) trading for European users via Zero Hash in April 2026, expanding institutional access amid SOL at $82 with projections to $88–$100 by month-end[4]. This new liquidity channel could influence markets predicting Solana ETF approvals or institutional inflows[3].
